description:
**Milestone:** Phase 1: Production-Grade Foundation

Install published @helix/library beta in fresh Drupal 11 and Next.js 15 projects. Verify all 13 components render correctly, form-associated components work with framework forms, theming works, and SSR doesn't break.
**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] All 13 components render in Drupal 11 Twig templates
- [ ] All 13 components render in Next.js 15 with React
- [ ] Form-associated components work with native form submission
- [ ] Theming via CSS custom properties works in both environments
- [ ] No SSR hydration errors in Next.js
- [ ] Issues documented and fixed

**Complexity:** medium
title: External testing in Drupal 11 and Next.js 15
